episodes.title: The HORRIFYING Truth Behind Smallville’s Allison Mack & The NXIVM Cult | 232
episodes.description:
We all knew her as the lovable Chloe Sullivan on Smallville, but behind the scenes, Allison Mack was hiding a deeply disturbing secret. In this episode of Five's a Crowd, we dive deep into the sick reality of the NXIVM sex cult and the sinister figurehead, Keith Raniere. From executive success seminars to the terrifying dark underbelly of DOS, blackmail, and human branding, we break down how a beloved CW sweetheart became a master enforcer in one of the most shocking true-crime stories in Hollywood history.

Thank you for being part of this crowd!

You've got burning questions, we've got answers! Call or Text us for the worst advice imaginable, and we may feature it on an upcoming podcast! 
** 801-513-3373 **

episodes.title: The Cult Next Door - The Zion Society: Abuse, Raid, & Takedown
episodes.description: In this episode, we delve into the chilling story of the Zion Society, a secretive cult that operated in North Ogden, Utah during the 1980s and early 90s. Led by Arvin Shreeve, the group manipulated vulnerable individuals into a twisted world of abuse, control, and deception. Join us as we uncover the disturbing details of this forgotten chapter in Utah's history, from the cult's rise to its dramatic fall, and explore how survivors found the strength to break free and seek justice.
